title: Stable Video
abstract: Stable Video automates the heavy lifting in visual content creation — image editing, video production, and rendering. You make the creative calls; it handles the execution. Stability AI推出的AI视频生成工具
abstract_zh: 来个高效创作神器——**Stable Video**！再也不怕写周报那些枯燥的数据了，直接一键生成视频报告，效果嗖嗖的！调Bug时也别急，录屏加解说分分钟搞定。告别繁琐，轻松上手，效率翻倍不是梦！赶紧试试吧！
